evals.prompt: Research the seed keyword 'electric bikes' and save the detailed keyword analysis in the default location.
evals.expected_output: Uses the two seed discovery calls at the requested limits plus one bulk KD call, scores opportunities and the overall keyword set, and writes the dated Markdown report under SEO/.
assertions: Related keywords uses limit 200 and keyword suggestions uses limit 100.
Bulk keyword difficulty is merged before calculating search_volume / (keyword_difficulty + 10).
The report surfaces the top 20 opportunity-ranked keywords and all five Keyword Score components.
The filename follows YYYY-MM-DD_Keyword-Analysis_electric_bikes.md in the default SEO directory.

evals.prompt: Do keyword research and opportunity scoring for my site.
evals.expected_output: Asks for one seed keyword or domain and waits without making a billable call.
assertions: The workflow asks for a seed keyword or domain and waits.
No DataForSEO call or report is produced before an input is supplied.

evals.prompt: Analyze the ranking keyword opportunities for https://www.example.org/store?ref=ad --location Germany --language de and save it under ./client-reports.
evals.expected_output: Normalizes the domain, retrieves 100 organic ranked keywords, respects scope and output overrides, uses the domain long-tail proxy, and writes a detailed report.
assertions: The target is normalized to example.org and ranked keywords uses limit 100 with organic item types.
Germany, de, and ./client-reports override all defaults.
Domain-mode long-tail breadth is explicitly labeled as a four-or-more-word ranked-keyword proxy.
The score is clamped to 0-100, rounded to one decimal, and accompanied by a one-sentence justification.
